top3.sql:
WITH rank_avg AS (
  SELECT 
    FacRank,
    AVG(FacSalary) AS avg_salary
  FROM university_faculty
  GROUP BY FacRank
),
salary_diff AS (
  SELECT 
    f.FacRank,
    f.FacFirstName,
    f.FacLastName,
    f.FacSalary,
    ABS(f.FacSalary - r.avg_salary) AS salary_diff
  FROM university_faculty f
  JOIN rank_avg r ON f.FacRank = r.FacRank
)
SELECT 
  FacRank,
  FacFirstName,
  FacLastName,
  FacSalary
FROM salary_diff
WHERE salary_diff = (SELECT MIN(salary_diff) FROM salary_diff);

final.sql:
WITH rank_avg AS (
  SELECT 
    FacRank,
    AVG(FacSalary) AS avg_salary
  FROM university_faculty
  GROUP BY FacRank
),
salary_diff AS (
  SELECT 
    f.FacRank,
    f.FacFirstName,
    f.FacLastName,
    f.FacSalary,
    ABS(f.FacSalary - r.avg_salary) AS salary_diff
  FROM university_faculty f
  JOIN rank_avg r ON f.FacRank = r.FacRank
)
SELECT 
  FacRank,
  FacFirstName,
  FacLastName,
  FacSalary
FROM salary_diff
WHERE salary_diff = (SELECT MIN(salary_diff) FROM salary_diff);
